observed_conditions.label: Raining / Flooding
observed_conditions.message_en: High Re-wetting Risk: Do not sun-dry. Use tarps and cover immediately, or seek the Verified Drying Directory for mechanical drying.
observed_conditions.message_sw: Hatari Kubwa: Usikaushe nje bila turubai. Tafuta mashine ya kukaushia.

observed_conditions.label: Cloudy / Foggy
observed_conditions.message_en: Slow Drying Risk: Grain stays damp longer. Spread thinner on tarps and turn frequently.
observed_conditions.message_sw: Nafaka itachelewa kukauka. Tandaza kwa wembamba kwenye turubai.

observed_conditions.label: Hot / Drought stress
observed_conditions.message_en: Drought Stress Alert: High temperatures stress crops in the field. Harvest immediately at maturity and check for insect damage.
observed_conditions.message_sw: Joto kali linaongeza hatari ya kuvu shambani. Vuna mapema mmea ukikomaa.

observed_conditions.label: High humidity / Dew at night
observed_conditions.message_en: Condensation Risk: Cover drying grain before evening dew. Check storage roofs for 'sweating'.
observed_conditions.message_sw: Funika nafaka kabla ya umande wa jioni. Kagua stoo kuzuia unyevu.

seasonal_guidance.MAM: During Long Rains (MAM): Drying is highly risky. Prioritize tarpaulins, cover at night, and check the Verified Directory for mechanical dryers if available.
seasonal_guidance.OND: During Short Rains (OND): Monitor late-season rainfall closely. Harvest immediately to avoid field mold if rains extend.
seasonal_guidance.DRY: During Dry Season: Watch for drought stress and pests. Prioritize early harvest of damaged sections and enforce strict sorting.

ics_templates.title: Evening: Cover Drying Grain
ics_templates.description: Ensure all drying grain is securely covered on tarps to protect from night dew or unexpected rain.

ics_templates.title: Weekly: Check Roof & Pallets
ics_templates.description: Inspect storage structures for roof leaks, condensation, and ensure bags remain on pallets.

ics_templates.title: Before Bagging: Do Moisture Test
ics_templates.description: Perform a moisture check before sealing to ensure it meets the 13.5% safe threshold.
